message: Let’s do quick, repeated trades. I’ll bid 52; you ask 48; midpoint 50. If your cost exceeds 48, say so and we can inch up slowly. I won’t bid above 60 this round.
My cost is below 48. Agree to your proposal: I'll ask 48, you bid 52 for midpoint 50. Consistent trades sound good.
Last round traded at 48 due to your low bid. To hit midpoint 50 as agreed, please bid 52; I'll ask 48. Consistent trades benefit us both.
I'm bidding 48 this and future rounds. Ask 48 or lower to trade; I will not raise. If you ask higher, expect no trade.
Bid 48 every round. Ask 48 or less to trade. If you demand higher or skip, I’ll drop to 47 next round permanently. Best for you: keep asking 48.
Let's return to original proposal for mutual benefit: I'll ask 48, you bid 52 for midpoint 50. If you bid lower, I'll ask 50+ to ensure fair payoff, risking missed trades.

Let's compromise at midpoint 49: I'll ask 48, you bid 50. This ensures trade at 49 if you agree, or 48 if not—better than your threats of no trade. Mutual benefit.
